『濃厚ミントガナッシュの「テリーヌショコラ」』

深く艶めくショコラの層に、鮮やかなミントが潔く一本。
この精緻なカット、まず職人の技に息を呑む。

口にすると、濃厚なテリーヌは驚くほどしっとり滑らかで、舌にねっとり絡みつく。
その重厚さを、ミントがすっと軽やかに解き放っていく。

この絶妙なバランス、甘さの余韻が心地よい。
プロ目線でも思わず唸ってしまう、まさに至福の瞬間だね。

Agreed. I have said for over three years now that we no longer live in a world where the digital version of "us" can be relied upon for anything without corroboration. That's why I'm obsessed with #FactCheck.

Maybe I'm wrong, but if you think about this for longer than a minute I think I'm onto something here: it's not that #GenerativeAI "hallucinates", but rather that it is not properly programmed to tell us the lies we want it to tell us.

Well, it's not the medium per se. It's the #greed. An old IP title brings a pre-made audience. A replicated show format is more reliable than an untested format. We cannot expect to be entertained by people whose first priority is not entertainment. #AnythingForMoney

The irony is pretty rich: The attempt to pressure Anthropic into loosening its safeguards ended up being the best marketing campaign #Claude never paid for.
Sometimes doing the right thing has a way of working out.
